name: ngombor-pages
description: Ngombor Community Development Alliance (NGOCDA) single-page microsite

scripts.test: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['public/index.html', 'public/styles.css', 'public/app.js'].forEach(f => { if (!fs.existsSync(f)) { console.error('Missing required file: ' + f); process.exit(1); } }); console.log('All core asset files exist successfully.');"

author: Aaron Bronow
